declared_unit: a single piece of transformer (including packaging) operating for 35 years
note: This EPD follows PCR 2019:12 for liquid immersed transformers and reports results by Upstream / Core / Downstream modules rather than the standard EN 15804 A1-A3 production-stage modules. No A1-A3 GWP values are provided. For reference, total cradle-to-grave GWP: GWP-fossil 3.57E+04, GWP-biogenic 1.09E+02, GWP-total 3.69E+04, GWP-GHG 3.70E+04 kg CO2 eq. per declared unit (whole transformer over 35 years). A1-A3 fields set to null because they are not reported as such.
